name: Maple Walnut Ice Cream
recipeInstructions:
1. Scald the cream, dissolving 1/2 cup granulated maple sugar and 1/4 cup maple syrup (or use 3/4 cup maple syrup) into it.
2. Add a pinch of salt.
3. Chill overnight in a glass container.
4. Freeze in an ice cream freezer, adding chopped walnuts and chopped hard maple sugar before the last 20 cranks.
5. Pack and freeze until firm.
Makes 3 pints.
